design_philosophy: Apple-style minimalism, extreme cleanliness, deep dark mode, generous spacing, structural grayscale with precise turquoise/blue accents. Emphasis on smooth 300-500ms transitions and optical alignment.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Apple-style spacing. Components should breathe. Use p-6, p-8, p-12.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards/images, rounded-full for badges and primary buttons.

navbar.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/40
navbar.mobile: Hamburger menu toggles a full-screen or slide-over sheet.
navbar.features: Search bar (magnifying glass), Cart icon with turquoise count badge (rounded-full), User avatar/Auth button, Dark mode toggle.

hero_swiper.style: Full width or rounded-3xl container, high contrast text overlays (bg-black/30), pagination bullets (turquoise active state).

category_nav.style: Horizontal scrollable list, hidden scrollbar. Sticky under navbar on scroll.
category_nav.items: Pill-shaped buttons, active state: bg-primary text-primary-foreground, inactive: bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted/80.

product_card.style: Cardless or subtle bg-card with rounded-2xl, overflow-hidden. Image container with aspect-square bg-muted/30.
product_card.content: Image (hover scale-105 transition-transform 500ms), Brand (small text), Name (font-medium truncate 2 lines), Price (font-semibold text-lg). No color selection on card, only 'In Stock'/'Out of Stock' small badge.
product_card.action: Hover reveals 'Add to Cart' button or it's always visible as a simple icon button.

product_page.interactions: Color selector changes main gallery image. Qty selector ensures value <= available stock.

auth.flow: Email -> OTP -> Password -> Save (bcrypt/JWT mock for frontend UI).
auth.style: Centered card with glassmorphism or solid bg-card, clean inputs (border-b only or highly rounded).

admin_panel.style: Dense tabular data (Shadcn Table), actions on hover, drag&drop for categories.

about_us.content: Text blocks with generous line-height, Yandex map iframe (grayscale filter via CSS if possible), and Image gallery.

animations.hover_states: Buttons and links slight opacity change or background tint. Images scale-105.
animations.page_transitions: Framer motion fade-in (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) on mount.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark_and_light theme variables in Tailwind config.
The category list must be sticky and horizontally scrollable.
Product grid MUST be 2 cols on mobile, 3 tablet, 4+ desktop.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Avoid using Shadcn's basic card for the main product items if it looks too bulky. Go for a cardless Apple-style look.
Implement the shopping cart logic using Zustand for state management.
Ensure 'Outfit' and 'Figtree' fonts are properly loaded.
